title: TrUtils
description: A library mod with a bunch of random utilities.
body:
# TrUtils

A random collection of utilities for my mods.

Here is a list of the most notable features:
- Runtime datagen API
- Tools that work on multiple blocks at once (similar to [Magna](https://github.com/Draylar/magna))

Some of these features are used in the testmod. If you want to learn more, go check it out [here](https://github.com/Tr100000/TrUtils/tree/main/src/testmod).
